facts: support-only quietness is intentional
no dominant skybox, shell, or environmental spectacle is required
no literal government setting or fiscal infographic background is required
visibleAbsence.rationale: The current construction authority places creative weight on bold planes, central transformed grid structure, handmade marks, and shallow depth; the environment exists so those parts can work reliably.

plannedPart.intent: Provide technical compatibility scaffolding, camera-safe world context, scene bounds, and quiet support for later creative parts only.
plannedPart.messagePurpose: Provide technical compatibility scaffolding, camera-safe world context, scene bounds, and quiet support for later creative parts only.
plannedPart.visualTarget: Provide technical compatibility scaffolding, camera-safe world context, scene bounds, and quiet support for later creative parts only.
plannedPart.relationshipToWhole: It lets all creative parts share a stable world context while staying visually recessive; any visible ground or shell should serve readability and pale breathing space, not become the artwork's claim.

facts: no literal headline text is required
no exact numeric signage is required

plannedPart.intent: Make the selected news readable as a central, non-literal grid of large painted planes under measured fiscal pressure: a concentrated structure pushing against control, deadline, and balance without literal text or charts.

plannedPart.relationshipToWhole: This is the central subject/object cluster. Other parts frame it, texture it, route attention away from it, or stage it in shallow depth; they should not replace its selected-news burden.

facts: patterns may be uneven and incomplete
